meta.title: My Dashboard | ITAKAI
meta.description: Student main dashboard. Review your progress, latest missions, and XP stats.

dashboard.subtitle: Continue your learning journey and complete new missions

my_classes.title: My Classes
my_classes.empty: You are not enrolled in any class yet

latest_missions.title: Latest Missions
latest_missions.empty: No recent missions. Explore new missions!

ai_assistant.name: Atenea
ai_assistant.message_new_user: Hello {name}! Welcome to ITAKAI. Complete your first mission to start earning XP!
ai_assistant.message_returning_user: Hello {name}! You have completed {missions_completed} missions in {classes_enrolled} classes. Keep it up!

meta.title: My Missions | ITAKAI
meta.description: Explore and complete educational missions. Earn XP and unlock new challenges.

missions.page_subtitle: Explore and complete missions to gain experience

empty.title: No missions

empty.rarity_no_missions: There are no missions with the selected rarities
empty.status_no_missions: There are no missions with the selected statuses
empty.coming_soon: New missions will be available soon

atenea.message: Hello! I'm here to help you with "{mission_title}". Ready to start this adventure?

rewards.unlock_badge_hint: Complete all enigmas in this mission to unlock this badge.

submission.success: Submission sent successfully. The teacher will review it soon.
submission.expired_error: This mission has expired. You can no longer submit enigmas.

meta.title: My Classes | ITAKAI
meta.description: Access your enrolled classes, review your progress, and discover new assigned missions.

empty.title: You have no classes
empty.description: You are not enrolled in any class yet. Ask your teacher for the code to join.

ai_assistant.subtitle: Your guide in this class
ai_assistant.message: Hello! I'm here to help you with any questions you have about this class. How can I help you today?

missions_tab.empty_rarity: There are no missions with the selected rarities
missions_tab.empty_default: There are no missions assigned in this class yet.

avatar_tab.choose_guide: Choose your guide for this class
avatar_tab.describe_avatar: Describe how you want your avatar to look:
avatar_tab.example_text: A young warrior with golden armor, dark hair and bright eyes, holding a shield with the symbol of Atenea. Epic and heroic style, inspired by Greek mythology ...
avatar_tab.tip: Tip: Be specific with colors, clothing, accessories, and style. The AI will create your avatar based on the character you selected.
avatar_tab.no_guide_hint: Choose your guide to see your avatar
avatar_tab.generate_error: Could not generate the avatar. Please try again in a few seconds.

shop.help_coins: Coins: earn them with missions and redeem them for rewards.
shop.help_mana: Mana: use it to activate powers.

shop.redeem_error: The redemption could not be completed.
shop.owned_empty_description: Buy powers or perks in the shop and they'll appear here.
shop.history_uses_empty: You haven't used any item yet.
shop.history_empty_description: Your purchases and the powers you use will appear here.
shop.powers_empty_description: Your teacher hasn't added any powers yet. Check back later.
